title: update plan's inline projection may cause column resolution error
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```
CREATE TABLE tb1 (cid INT, code INT, class VARCHAR(10));
CREATE TABLE tb2 (cid INT, code INT, class VARCHAR(10));
INSERT INTO tb1 (cid, code, class) VALUES(1, 1, 'old');
INSERT INTO tb2 (cid, code, class) VALUES(1, 1, 'new');
UPDATE tb1, (SELECT code AS cid, code, MAX(class) AS class FROM tb2 GROUP BY code) tb3 SET tb1.cid = tb3.cid, tb1.code = tb3.code, tb1.class = tb3.class;
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

Update executes successfully.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tb3 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(10, 2), description TEXT);
CREATE TABLE tb4 (id INT, value DECIMAL(10, 2), description TEXT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO tb3 (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 10.50, 'first entry'), (2, 20.75, 'second entry');
INSERT INTO tb4 (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 15.00, 'new value'), (2, NULL, 'missing value');
UPDATE tb3 SET value = (SELECT MAX(value) FROM tb4 WHERE tb4.id = tb3.id) WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: update with inline projection causes column resolution error
